verse_text: At the same time, on the tenth day of the month Sivan, Baruch took the silver vessels of the house of the Lord fashioned by Zedekiah the son of Josiah, king of Judah, in order to return them to the land of Judah, those vessels previously taken away from the temple

links.context: This does not mean that the vessels will never be returned, for they were ([[BAR.1:8]]). The false prophets were delivering a false word.
